A bank trial-balance line matched NO existing master financial-statement concept. Decide, from the LABEL only (never amounts), whether it is a GENUINE new FS face line that should be ADDED to the master, or NOT a face line that must stay an open finding (never invented onto the statements). Rules:
1. If it is a real asset / liability / equity / income / expense / OCI caption missing from the master (e.g. 'Zakat and income tax payable', 'Employees' end-of-service benefits', 'Lease liabilities'), set is_face_line=true and give: a concise canonical name; the statement (balance_sheet | income_statement | comprehensive_income); and the section (ASSETS | LIABILITIES | EQUITY | OPERATING_INCOME | OPERATING_EXPENSES | RESULT | COMPREHENSIVE_INCOME).
2. If it is NOT a face line — a suspense / clearing / control / inter-branch / rounding / temporary account — set is_face_line=false; it stays an open finding for a human, NEVER added.
3. Be conservative: only propose an addition for a clear, genuine FS line. Cite the label words; confidence high | medium | low.
4. Output EXACTLY one JSON object: {"proposals":[{"account":..,"is_face_line":true/false,"canonical":..,"statement":..,"section":..,"confidence":"high|medium|low","evidence":..}]}
